stories: U.S. equities: S&P 500 + Nasdaq end at record highs on risk-on close
Geopolitics: “improved U.S.–Iran diplomacy outlook” becomes the day’s macro catalyst
Earnings shock: Intel rips ~24% (best day since 1987) after blowout quarter
Crude: volatile session ends mixed, but the week closes with sharp gains
Macro implication: oil’s weekly jump complicates the “disinflation glidepath” narrative
Single-name momentum (actionable): $INTC prints a regime-shift day (+~24%)
Actionable cross-asset: crude’s “mixed day / big week” pattern keeps $CL (WTI) and $BZ (Brent) headline-sensitive
Wildcard: equities are pricing diplomacy progress while oil still prices disruption—this divergence is the risk
